headline: Benchmark Maintains Buy on Charter Communications, Lowers Price Target to $435
summary: Benchmark  analyst Matthew Harrigan   maintains Charter Communications (NASDAQ:CHTR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $455 to $435.

headline: Charter (CHTR) Reports Earnings Tomorrow: What To Expect
summary: Cable, internet, and telephone services provider Charter (NASDAQ:CHTR) will be reporting earnings this Friday before market hours. Here’s what to look for.
